prompt: A tidy medium-sized bedroom in warm modern realistic style with soft lighting. A neatly made bed with patterned blue-grey bedding against the wall, a dark wooden desk with a laptop and desk lamp beside it, a dark bookshelf filled with books, an armchair with a throw blanket, a guitar leaning against the bookshelf, and a potted plant on the windowsill. A doorway on the left leads to the dining area. Clean, organized, warm atmosphere of a young adult male's living space. Behind the current viewpoint, the door to the dining area opens into a hallway with a coat rack and shoes by the entrance. Through the window, the rooftops of neighboring buildings and a tree canopy are visible outside. To the right of the desk, a small closet with a sliding door is built into the wall. First-person viewer. First-person point of view standing inside the bedroom, looking forward across the room toward the bed, desk, and bookshelf. No visible character body.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A tidy medium-sized bedroom in warm modern realistic style has soft lighting. A neatly made bed with patterned blue-grey bedding is placed against the wall, a dark wooden desk with a laptop and desk lamp is situated beside the bed, a dark bookshelf filled with books stands in the corner near the window, an armchair with a throw blanket is positioned near the bookshelf, a guitar leans against the bookshelf, and a potted plant is placed near the windowsill. A doorway on the left leads to the dining area. The space has a clean, organized, warm atmosphere of a young adult male's living space.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Behind the current viewpoint, the door to the dining area opens into a hallway with a coat rack and shoes by the entrance. Through the window, the rooftops of neighboring buildings and a tree canopy are visible outside. To the right of the desk, a small closet with a sliding door is built into the wall.
